data.title: RED: add test_file_explanation_present structural test for pre-write explanations
data.description:
## Story
4d15-157d

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Add structural test `test_file_explanation_present` to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` and RED marker to `.test-index`.

Test verifies SKILL.md has plain-language explanation instructions before infrastructure file writes. Per behavioral testing standard Rule 5 — structural boundary only, no content assertions.

Suggested structural checks (all must pass):
- Explanation instruction present near DSO shim install section: grep for 'shim' within 5 lines of an explanation-like keyword pattern (e.g., 'command-line', 'shortcut', 'entry point')
- Explanation instruction present near hook install section: grep for 'pre-commit hook' or 'hooks' within 5 lines of an explanation-like keyword
- General: grep SKILL.md for 'Before writing' or 'plain-language' pattern near Step 2b/2c

Or simpler: check presence of explanation text for the 3 key artifacts using multi-pattern grep.

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh — add test_file_explanation_present() + call before print_summary
- .test-index — add: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_file_explanation_present]

## Acceptance Criteria
- test_file_explanation_present added
- .test-index RED marker added
- Test FAILS RED before Task 2
